groups.name: llm
groups.description: Top-level LLM configuration (router-level settings and per-provider flags).

properties.name: llm.provider
properties.description: Primary LLM provider hint consumed by LlmRouter. If set, the enabled client whose provider id starts with this value (e.g. 'ollama', 'openai', 'anthropic', 'azure') is used first; remaining enabled clients act as fallbacks.

properties.name: llm.timeout
properties.description: HTTP connect/read timeout applied to all LLM RestClients (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, Azure).

properties.name: llm.ollama.enabled
properties.description: Register the Ollama LlmClient bean. Defaults to true.

properties.name: llm.ollama.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the Ollama server.

properties.name: llm.openai.api-key
properties.description: OpenAI API key. Required when llm.openai.enabled=true.

properties.name: llm.openai.base-url
properties.description: OpenAI API base URL (override for Mistral or other OpenAI-compatible gateways).

properties.name: llm.anthropic.api-key
properties.description: Anthropic API key. Required when llm.anthropic.enabled=true.

properties.name: llm.azure.enabled
properties.description: Register the Azure OpenAI LlmClient bean.

properties.name: llm.azure.endpoint
properties.description: Azure OpenAI endpoint URL. Required when llm.azure.enabled=true.

properties.name: llm.azure.api-key
properties.description: Azure OpenAI API key. Required when llm.azure.enabled=true.

values.description: OpenAI GPT models (or Mistral via base-url override)
